# Flipzy — Your Reading Companion

> Flipzy helps kids fall in love with reading through interactive, playful story experiences.

## What is Flipzy?
Flipzy is a reading companion for children ages 4–10. It turns physical books into interactive audio experiences with character voices, sound effects, and narration — so kids stay engaged and come back to stories again and again.

## Who is it for?
Parents of young children who want to make reading time more engaging, especially when they're busy or tired.

## Current status
Flipzy is in early development. We're gathering feedback from parents to shape the product.

## Website
https://flipzyreads.com

hello@flipzyreads.com
